title: How fast did the winning car go?

meanings.usage: 指速度竞赛，如汽车比赛、赛马等
指对某事的兴奋或激动情绪
形容物品外观时指美观大方，也可形容人英俊
车辆的轮子或操纵方向的轮子
指猛然爆发的声响或物理现象
指向山下或地势低的方向移动
指物体移动的快慢程度
指在比赛或竞争中的对手
指完成某项任务或过程
指报名参加比赛或进入某处
指机器或车辆出现故障
指到达某个程度或地点

phrases.usage: 大量的（后接不可数名词）

examples.en: There was a great deal of excitement just before the race began.
examples.zh: 比赛开始前有大量的兴奋情绪。

examples.en: It was the oldest car taking part in the race.
examples.zh: 这是参加比赛的最老的汽车。

examples.en: Many of the cars broke down on the course.
examples.zh: 许多汽车在赛道上抛锚了。

examples.en: The driver had a lot of trouble trying to stop it.
examples.zh: 司机费了很大劲才把它停下来。

examples.en: It sped downhill at the end of the race.
examples.zh: 它在比赛结束时加速下坡。

examples.en: The race gave everyone a great deal of pleasure.
examples.zh: 比赛给每个人都带来了很大的乐趣。

examples.en: It was very different from modern car races.
examples.zh: 它与现代汽车比赛非常不同。

examples.en: Once a year, a race is held for old cars.
examples.zh: 每年举行一次老式汽车比赛。

examples.en: Some drivers spent more time under their cars than in them!
examples.zh: 一些司机花在车底下的时间比在车里的时间还多！

phrases.usage: 同样精彩（双重否定表示肯定）

examples.en: It was very different but no less exciting.
examples.zh: 它非常不同，但同样精彩。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 描述过去发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.usage: 叙述过去的事件，故事背景等

examples.en: A lot of cars entered for this race last year.
examples.zh: 去年很多汽车报名参加了比赛。

examples.en: The race began after a great many loud explosions.
examples.zh: 在一阵巨大的爆炸声后，比赛开始了。

examples.en: The winning car reached a speed of forty miles an hour.
examples.zh: 获胜的车辆达到了每小时四十英里的速度。

grammar.title: 形容词最高级 (Superlative Adjective)
grammar.usage: 用于比较多个事物时，指出最...的一个

examples.en: One of the most handsome cars was a Rolls-Royce Silver Ghost.
examples.zh: 最漂亮的汽车之一是一辆劳斯莱斯银魅。

examples.en: It was the oldest car taking part.
examples.zh: 这是参加比赛的最老的汽车。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 描述过去正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 描述过去某个时刻正在发生的动作

examples.en: There was a great deal of excitement just before it began.
examples.zh: 比赛开始前有大量的兴奋情绪。

original.en: Once a year, a race is held for old cars.
original.zh: 每年举行一次老式汽车比赛。

imitations.en: Once a year, we have a reunion with old friends.
imitations.zh: 每年我们都会和老朋友聚会一次。

imitations.en: Once a year, the town holds a flower festival.
imitations.zh: 这个城镇每年举办一次花展。

sentencePatterns.pattern: There was/were + 名词 + 形容词/介词短语

original.en: There was a great deal of excitement just before it began.
original.zh: 比赛开始前有大量的兴奋情绪。

imitations.en: There was a great deal of traffic on the road.
There were many people waiting at the station.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had (a lot of) trouble doing something

original.en: The driver had a lot of trouble trying to stop it.
original.zh: 司机费了很大劲才把它停下来。

imitations.en: I had a lot of trouble finding your house.
imitations.zh: 我费了很大劲才找到你家。

imitations.en: She had trouble understanding the lecture.

sentencePatterns.pattern: It was + the + 最高级 + 名词 + doing/定语从句

original.en: Built in 1885, it was the oldest car taking part.
original.zh: 它制造于1885年，是参加比赛的最老的汽车。

imitations.en: Written in 1990, it was the most popular book that year.
imitations.zh: 写于1990年，它是那一年最受欢迎的书。

imitations.en: Located in the center, it was the most convenient hotel to stay.
imitations.zh: 位于中心地带，它是最便利的住宿酒店。
